description_long: This is a yellow bottle with a slightly tapered neck and a black screw cap. The body of the bottle features a white checkered pattern on one side and a large black exclamation mark on another, both of which stand out against the yellow background. The bottle has a smooth, hard surface with subtle horizontal ridges near the neck, suggesting a grip or decorative feature. The overall shape is hexagonal or polygonal in cross-section, giving it a modern, stylized appearance. The bottle appears to be made of plastic, commonly used for beverages or condiments in urban environments. There are no visible signs of damage, and the bottle is opaque, making it impossible to see the contents inside.
description: A yellow, polygonal plastic bottle with a black screw cap, white checkered pattern, and a bold black exclamation mark. The surface is smooth and hard, with decorative ridges near the neck.
description_view_0: The bottle is shown with the white checkered pattern visible on the lower right side and the black cap on top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the large black exclamation mark on the front, with part of the checkered pattern visible to the left.
description_view_2: The back of the bottle is plain yellow with no visible markings or patterns, showing the smooth surface and ridged neck.
description_view_3: Another rear view, similar to view 2, displaying the plain yellow surface and the bottle's polygonal shape.
attribute_label_or_branding: White checkered pattern and a large black exclamation mark on the body; no text or logos visible.
